production_decision_reasons: constant-alpha stability is evaluated below rather than assumed
the directional oracle has only a black lower boundary
the grid has no surface-albedo variation
slab-boundary flux/BRF does not define a depth-resolved marcher source
the single-HG slab omits 3-D cloud geometry and spectral microphysics

observable_contract.directional: CUDA, analytic single scatter, and legacy proxy are BRF = pi*I/(F0*mu0).
observable_contract.forbidden_inference: No directional error, ratio, fit, or production decision mixes delta flux with CUDA BRF.
observable_contract.hemispheric: Delta-two-stream columns are upward/downward hemispheric flux fractions.

tau_30_provisional.reason: all tau=30 paths have nonzero max-order truncation; reported Monte Carlo intervals do not include this bias
tau_30_provisional.required_followup: rerun paired max_scatters=1024/2048 and require BRF convergence inside max(0.002, two pooled standard errors)

surface_albedo_coverage.conclusion: black-surface-only; no cross-albedo directional stability claim is possible
